caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bowtie, glasses, and a distinctive grey, beehive-style wig sits in a studio. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background is a cluttered wall featuring framed photos and clothing items on hangers, including a "LEE" brand tag. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left reads "THE TALK BOX PODCAST" and another on the right reads "BOSS TALK JOY". As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak, his mouth moving and his head shifting slightly, while the camera angle and studio setting remain static. His expression remains focused as he communicates during the recording session.
